title: delphinium cyphoplectrum subsp. pallidiflorum
intro: Delphinium cyphoplectrum subsp. pallidiflorum is a subspecies of the delphinium genus, commonly known as the mountain delphinium or larkspur, a flowering plant native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, antitussive, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Delphinium cyphoplectrum subsp. pallidiflorum include its ability to relieve coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as a sedative and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
